en-US.title: StallPass: Find Bathrooms Fast
en-US.subtitle: Crowd-Sourced Restroom Finder
en-US.description:
StallPass helps you find a usable bathroom when timing matters. Open the map to discover nearby public and business restrooms, check access-code availability, compare cleanliness signals, and save dependable stops for later.

Built for city movement, travel days, families, delivery shifts, accessibility needs, and urgent moments, StallPass combines community updates with practical restroom details so you can decide quickly before walking across town.

Key features:
- Nearby bathroom discovery on a mobile-first map
- Search with filters for access, accessibility, cleanliness, and public availability
- Access-code support with community verification
- Live status and cleanliness ratings
- Favorites for trusted stops
- Offline city packs and route-aware bathroom planning
- Business-verified metadata where owners manage listing details

Location is used only to find relevant bathrooms and improve nearby search. You can browse as a guest, and signing in is optional unless you want to save favorites, submit updates, or manage business listings.
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial StallPass launch with nearby restroom discovery, search filters, access-code support, favorites, accessibility details, offline-aware flows, and business-verified listing controls.
en-US.promoText: Find nearby bathrooms, access details, ratings, accessibility notes, and offline-ready saved stops.
